title: Migrate OpenClaw Studio to core-only frontend sibling project
description: Create /data/projects/openclaw-studio-core as a UI-only frontend clone of Studio look-and-feel. Preserve visual/interaction behavior while EXCLUDING backend internals: no gateway transport logic, no websocket/http protocol implementation, no server routes, no SSH/fs operational code, and no runtime orchestration internals.

title: Write migration map and core-only boundary contract
description: Create docs/migration-map.md in the new sibling project with retained/split/excluded assets, forbidden imports, and an explicit no-regression feature parity matrix covering every current e2e flow and major unit-tested behavior.
close_reason: Completed

title: Migrate low-coupling components to pure React props
description: Port easy presentational components first (e.g., EmptyStatePanel, AgentAvatar, ThemeToggle, HeaderBar) and remove Next/gateway-specific imports.
close_reason: Completed

title: Extract chat panel presentation from runtime orchestration
description: Split AgentChatPanel into pure rendering components driven by props/callbacks and local adapters, preserving current chat functionality: approvals UI, composer autoresize, controls, markdown rendering, transcript behavior, scroll/near-bottom behavior, and tool/thinking content rendering.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Extract inspect/settings panels into frontend-only presentation layer
description: Port AgentInspectPanels and related settings surfaces as frontend-only presentation while preserving existing capabilities (agent settings, brain/inspect tabs, cron controls, skills sections, and editing flows) through typed adapter interfaces.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Compose static Studio shell in App.tsx with local interaction state
description: Compose complete UI shell look-and-feel parity using frontend adapters/mocks only, with no backend communication internals in the new project.
acceptance_criteria: Shell demonstrates end-to-end interaction across all migrated feature domains using deterministic adapter data; no critical workflow from the parity matrix is missing in the composed UI.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with composed shell and expanded deterministic unit/scenario coverage; validation artifacts updated.

title: Add forbidden-import guard to enforce core-only dependency boundary
description: Add hard guardrails that fail builds if backend/runtime internals leak into the new core project (next/server routes, gateway client/proxy/runtime modules, ws transport, ssh/fs operation helpers).
acceptance_criteria: Guard fails on forbidden imports/usages and transport/server constructs; shell/components compile and run without any backend communication implementation in the new project.
close_reason: Completed

title: Add tests for shell interaction, markdown rendering, and theme behavior
description: Add comprehensive scenario-level tests for shell, markdown, and theme behavior with detailed logs. This bead is the human-readable scenario layer that complements lower-level parity unit/integration/e2e suites.
acceptance_criteria: Scenario tests are deterministic, verbose on failure, and mapped to parity matrix rows; logs include user action sequence and resulting UI state deltas.
close_reason: Added deterministic shell scenario coverage and verbose structured logging mapped to migrated shell behaviors.

title: Run full validation matrix and record evidence
description: Execute full validation matrix (dev, build, lint, typecheck, unit, integration, e2e, forbidden-import checks) and capture structured logs/artifacts proving no feature regressions and full acceptance criteria coverage.
acceptance_criteria: All quality gates pass; parity matrix has no open gaps; logs/artifacts are archived; forbidden-import guard is green; and architecture gate confirms zero backend transport/runtime internals were ported.
close_reason: Dropped from active scope: requires browser-runtime validation infrastructure not in target workflow.

title: Finalize migration report and update ExecPlan outcomes
description: Update docs/migration-map.md and .agent/execplan-pending.md progress/decision/outcomes sections with final implementation notes and remaining follow-ups.

title: Build exhaustive feature parity matrix from current Studio workflows
description: Enumerate every current user-visible UI workflow and acceptance check for look-and-feel parity only. Explicitly mark backend communication internals and runtime orchestration as non-goals for this migration phase.
acceptance_criteria: Parity matrix lists every currently supported workflow and maps each to implementation tasks plus unit/e2e test cases and log evidence requirements before signoff.
close_reason: Completed

title: Define UI façade adapter contracts (no transport/runtime internals)
description: Define UI-facing adapter contracts that provide view state and callback hooks only. Treat backend communication as opaque/out-of-scope: no protocol implementation, no websocket client internals, no server orchestration logic in this phase.
acceptance_criteria: All adapter types are presentation-oriented and backend-agnostic; zero imports from gateway transport/runtime/server internals in the new project.
close_reason: Completed

title: Document OpenClaw protocol compatibility boundary for future adapters
description: Document explicitly that OpenClaw protocol/transport internals are out-of-scope for this phase; capture only future integration notes without implementing or porting communication logic.
close_reason: Completed

title: Create deterministic UI-state simulators with debug logging
description: Create deterministic mock simulators for UI state transitions only (status changes, list updates, action outcomes). Do not emulate or port real transport/protocol behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Simulators drive visual/interactions for all UI workflows without implementing any network protocol logic; debug logs capture state deltas for each simulated action.
close_reason: Completed

title: Migrate connection + gateway settings UX with full behavior parity
description: Preserve connection/settings screen look-and-feel and interaction affordances using UI façade adapters only; no real gateway communication stack is ported.
acceptance_criteria: Connection states and settings UX match current behavior: connect/disconnect flows, retry paths, token input visibility/copy controls, and status messaging are covered by unit and e2e parity tests with detailed logs.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate fleet/sidebar/avatar/create selection workflows with parity
description: Preserve fleet sidebar interactions, agent avatar rendering, empty states, selection semantics, and create-agent related UX behavior that users rely on today.
acceptance_criteria: Fleet and avatar workflows match current behavior: selection changes, empty states, create flow affordances, and visual state updates are covered by parity unit/e2e tests and detailed logs.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate chat interaction workflows with full non-regression guarantees
description: Preserve chat UI behavior and rendering semantics as a frontend façade, driven by simulated state/callbacks; exclude transport/event-stream internals.
acceptance_criteria: Chat domain parity includes composer behavior, markdown/tool output rendering, approvals display, and scroll anchoring; all covered by unit/integration/e2e tests with step logs.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate inspect/settings/brain panels and mutation UX with parity
description: Preserve inspect panel tabs, settings editing interactions, brain/personality editing presentation, mutation status/error UX, and related controls with frontend-only adapters.
acceptance_criteria: Inspect/settings/brain flows preserve editing UX, section switching, and mutation feedback states; parity tests assert behaviors with detailed diagnostics.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate cron and skills workflows with parity and local simulators
description: Preserve cron creation/listing status UX and skills presentation/setup/remove workflows in the new frontend core using deterministic adapter-backed simulations.
acceptance_criteria: Cron and skills flows preserve list/create/remove/setup user journeys with adapter-simulated responses; parity tests validate success/error paths with detailed logs.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate exec approval lifecycle UX with parity
description: Preserve exec approval UX as frontend behavior only (visibility, state transitions, actions), backed by UI simulators; no approval protocol/runtime internals are ported.
acceptance_criteria: Exec approvals parity includes request surfacing, resolve/reject actions, lifecycle state transitions, and user feedback semantics; covered by regression tests with high-fidelity logging.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Migrate routing/stateful navigation behavior with parity
description: Preserve invalid-route redirects, settings-route semantics, query/path parameter behavior, and focused state restoration so user navigation flows remain intact.
acceptance_criteria: Routing parity includes invalid-route handling, settings route semantics, query/path synchronization, and focused state restoration, verified by unit/e2e tests with route transition logs.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Preserve theme/color semantic system and visual status language
description: Maintain current theme toggle behavior, semantic status coloring, and major visual affordances so users retain familiar readability and status interpretation.
acceptance_criteria: Theme and color semantics preserve readability and status meaning across light/dark modes; parity checks include visual-state assertions and accessibility checks.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Build comprehensive test logging harness for unit/integration/e2e
description: Add structured logging utilities and scripts that emit detailed step-level diagnostics, state snapshots, and failure context for all automated test layers.
acceptance_criteria: Test runs emit structured logs (JSON or line-delimited) with test id, step, action, key state snapshot, and failure context; logs are saved under a deterministic artifacts path; scripts exist for normal and verbose logging modes.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with deterministic shell integration and passing guard/typecheck/lint/test/build; remaining browser-environment constraints tracked in e2e/validation beads.

title: Scaffold /data/projects/openclaw-studio-core with Vite React TypeScript
description: Create the sibling project one folder up from openclaw-studio and confirm npm install + initial run works.
close_reason: Completed

title: Port and expand unit/integration tests for complete feature parity
description: Create a parity-driven unit/integration suite mapped to existing behavioral areas (chat, approvals, routing, connection, settings, cron, skills, theme, state workflows), with detailed logging in test output.
acceptance_criteria: Unit/integration suite covers all parity matrix feature rows; each migrated domain has regression tests; failing tests include detailed context logs; suite runs in CI and locally with deterministic output.
close_reason: Implemented in openclaw-studio-core with composed shell and expanded deterministic unit/scenario coverage; validation artifacts updated.

title: Implement full e2e parity scripts with rich artifacts and diagnostics
description: Build e2e specs covering all primary user journeys and configure verbose logs, traces, screenshots, videos, and artifact retention so regressions are obvious and debuggable. Provide scripts for smoke/full/debug e2e runs with clear output paths.
acceptance_criteria: E2E includes connection, fleet, chat, approvals, inspect/settings, cron/skills, routing, and theme flows; on failure capture traces/video/screenshots and step logs; on success capture concise execution logs and timing summary.
close_reason: Implemented full e2e parity scripts/spec scaffolding with diagnostics and artifact retention; runtime execution is environment-gated and tracked in validation/UX beads.

title: Run log-driven bug bash and close all parity gaps before signoff
description: Use outputs from unit/integration/e2e logging to identify regressions, fix root causes, and rerun until parity matrix and acceptance checks are all green.
close_reason: Dropped from active scope: requires browser-runtime validation infrastructure not in target workflow.

title: Verify UX quality, accessibility, and performance baselines
description: Add checks for keyboard access, focus visibility, readable contrast/status cues, and basic rendering performance to ensure users get a robust experience in the new core frontend.

title: Enforce UI-only architecture gate (no backend internals)
description: Create an explicit architecture gate defining forbidden backend/internal surfaces and a checklist proving the new project is presentation-only in this phase.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture gate is documented and automated checks enforce it: no ws transport logic, no server route code, no gateway runtime orchestration modules, no ssh/fs operational code in the new project.
close_reason: Completed

title: Configure baseline scripts and minimal UI dependencies
description: Ensure dev/build/lint/typecheck/test scripts exist and add only required UI dependencies (e.g., lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, react-markdown, remark-gfm if used).
close_reason: Completed

title: Create core folder architecture for components, layout, styles, types, and mocks
description: Set up src/components, src/layout, src/styles, src/types, src/mocks, and docs as the baseline structure for the new core app.
close_reason: Completed

title: Port CSS token layer from src/app/globals.css into plain CSS
description: Copy and trim token/global styles into src/styles/tokens.base.css, removing Tailwind/Next-specific imports and keeping only classes/variables needed by migrated components.
close_reason: Completed

title: Port markdown/chat styling subset for static rendering
description: Move only required markdown rules from src/app/styles/markdown.css into the new project and wire them to local components.
close_reason: Completed

title: Define frontend-only UI contracts in src/types/studio.ts
description: Create local types (connection status, agent summary, chat message, etc.) so components do not import gateway/store runtime modules.
close_reason: Completed

title: Create mock Studio data adapters for local-only UI execution
description: Implement src/mocks/studioMockData.ts with representative agent/chat/settings data to drive all shell interactions without backend calls.
close_reason: Completed
